backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor exposing a function that returns domain validation documentation text.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing carousel‑related UI updates, affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for numerous frontend components and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind base layers and OKLCH variable definitions with light/dark themes and default element styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point defining root container and loading the main React script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: App root component wrapping the landing page in an error boundary.
frontend/src/components/deployment/Deplo: Banner component that displays domain validation status using alert UI and helper functions.
frontend/src/components/landing/__tests_: Empty test file placeholder for SwipeCarouselSection.
frontend/src/components/landing/AppSecti: App showcase section rendering title text and a framed dashboard image.
frontend/src/components/landing/assets.t: Exports an array of carousel image asset paths and warns in dev if the count mismatches expectations.
frontend/src/components/landing/ClosingS: Closing section showing the final headline, subheadline with preserved line breaks, and description text.
frontend/src/components/landing/FaqSecti: FAQ section rendering accordion items from copy content using the shadcn accordion component.
frontend/src/components/landing/FooterNa: Footer with brand info, smooth‑scroll quick links, and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeaderNa: Sticky responsive header with logo, smooth‑scroll navigation links, and a mobile sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeroSect: Hero section presenting logo, problem and solution statements, supporting lines, and main headline using tbnCopy content.
frontend/src/components/landing/MediaFra: Image wrapper component that maintains aspect ratio, shows a loading spinner, and fades in the image when loaded.
frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCar: Interactive swipeable carousel with auto‑advance, drag/touch handling, and slide transitions driven by tbnCopy content.
Renders the TBN logo image with size presets and optional custom classes.
frontend/src/components/landing/TrustedB: Section displaying testimonials content and value statements from tbnCopy.
frontend/src/components/landing/WhoForSe: Section listing target audience checkmarks and closing statements sourced from tbnCopy.
frontend/src/components/runtime/AppError: React error boundary that displays a fallback UI with reload option and dev-only error details.
frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts: Centralized copy content for the landing page including hero text, carousel slide data, and marketing sections.
frontend/src/deployment/domain.ts: Defines the deployment domain slug constant.
frontend/src/deployment/validateDomain.t: Validates deployment domain strings and provides a descriptive rules message.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoAdvanceCarouse: Custom hook managing carousel index, auto‑advance timer, pausing, and manual navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useMeasuredElementHei: Custom hook that returns a ref and automatically tracks an element’s height using ResizeObserver.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind base styles and extensive custom theme variables and component utility classes for the site's dark gold-themed design.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that initializes React, sets up React Query, wraps the app with InternetIdentityProvider, and loads global styles.
frontend/src/pages/TbnLandingPage.tsx: Composes the marketing landing page by rendering all major sections including hero, app preview, carousel, and footer.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, goals, issues, and architectural notes for building and fixing the TBN marketing landing site.
